title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on European countries that impose digital tax
summary_full: US president says levy would be imposed immediately and supersede pre-existing trade deals with the country  Donald Trump has threatened to place a 100% import tariff on any European country that imposes a tax on digital services from US companies.Writing on Truth Social on Friday, the US president said that “numerous European countries” had been discussing putting a digital services tax on American companies and that “some of these countries are close to actually doing this”. Continue reading...
